high_items.title: Initech RFP follow-up question
high_items.subject: Re: Brand + UX engagement scope
high_items.why: Active RFP. Marcus is asking for a fixed-fee breakdown and references a board decision next week. Time-sensitive and high-value — direct path to a $20K+ engagement.

medium_items.title: Acme Corp asset handoff timing
medium_items.subject: Final logo files before launch?
medium_items.why: Existing client checking delivery timeline ahead of the June 3 launch. Needs a clear date but not blocking today.

medium_items.title: Podcast guest invitation
medium_items.subject: Guest on the Design Signal podcast
medium_items.why: Inbound brand-building opportunity. Worth a reply but lower urgency than client work.

medium_items.title: Globex contract redline
medium_items.subject: MSA redlines for review
medium_items.why: Standard contract redlines on the Globex engagement. Needs review before the proposal goes out Friday.

high_items.title: Stalled deal re-engagement: Vandelay
high_items.subject: Picking our project back up
high_items.why: A deal that went quiet 3 weeks ago just reopened. Vandelay wants to restart the brand sprint conversation — warm and ready to move.
